info.name: Current Weather Data For A Coordinate

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude in decimal degrees, range -90 to 90.

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude in decimal degrees, range -180 to 180.

params.name: mode
params.description: Response format. Default is JSON. Use xml or html for alternative formats.

params.name: units
params.description: Units of measurement. standard (Kelvin), metric (Celsius), or imperial (Fahrenheit).

params.name: lang
params.description: Localization language code for the weather condition output text.

items.docs: Returns current weather data for the supplied latitude and longitude. Data includes temperature, atmospheric pressure, humidity, visibility, wind, cloudiness, sunrise and sunset times, and a brief weather condition.
